author: Austin Crawford
title: Halloween Block Party - West end of Old Town Road
summary: Do not miss the second annual Halloween Block Party on West end of Old Town Road! There will be self-guided games for kids and the return of the Bouncy House. There will also be burgers, dogs, beer, rum cider and non-alcoholic beverages, a Halloween “lounge” for adults, and DJ Hennessy spinning tunes. Wear your costume and join this fun event for all ages.  Donations accepted and will benefit the Mary D. Fund.

Fund.
address: Old Town Rd New Shoreham Washington County

author: Austin Crawford
title: Visit a Block Island Garden
summary: The Block Island Gardeners community event, “Visit a Block Island Garden” on Wednesday, July 6 from 3 to 5 p.m. at the seaside home of Anna and Michael Lofaro. Event is free and refreshments provided. From Cooneymus Road, take the turn towards Southwest Point (just before the junction of Cooneymus and West Side Road) and follow the route marked by the giant daffodils. Rain date: July 7. For questions, call Maude at (203) 233-4889.
content: The Block Island Gardeners community event, “Visit a Block Island Garden” on Wednesday, July 6 from 3 to 5 p.m. at the seaside home of Anna and Michael Lofaro. For questions, call Maude at (203) 233-4889.

author: Cindy BlockIslandChamber
title: BIMI "Chowda" Fest
summary: Great chowder, especially clam chowder, is just this side of heaven in a bowl. East Coast chowders range from milky white New England-style, to tomato-based New York-style, to the briny clear broth that’s the hallmark of Rhode Island-style.
content:
Great chowder, especially clam chowder, is just this side of heaven in a bowl. East Coast chowders range from milky white New England-style, to tomato-based New York-style, to the briny clear broth that’s the hallmark of Rhode Island-style.

And you just may get to taste them all because it’s chefs’ choice when it comes to the annual BIMI Chowda Fest on Sunday, August 29 from 3:00 pm -5:00 pm at the Block Island Maritime Institute (BIMI).

author: Austin Crawford
title: Block Island Drama Club Winter Showcase at Wetherbees
summary: The Block Island School Drama Club is hosting a winter showcase at Wetherbee's. There will be two "showings" at 4:15 p.m. and 5:15 p.m. Expect to see a sneak peak of our spring production "Descendants The Musical!" Please come and support the Drama Club.
content: The Block Island School Drama Club is hosting a winter showcase at Wetherbee's. There will be two "showings" at 4:15 p.m. and 5:15 p.m. Expect to see a sneak peak of our spring production "Descendants The Musical!" Please come and support the Drama Club.

summary: Please join us for this free community music jam! Come to play, come to listen, open to all levels of experience. Instruments provided.
content:
Please join us for this free community music jam! Come to play, come to listen, open to all levels of experience. Instruments provided.

Every Saturday evening, 4:30-6 pm until April.

author: Austin Crawford
title: Raptors Over the Fields: Fall Walk to Lewis Farm - James Stover Exploration
summary: Meet at intersection of Cooneymus Road & Lewis Farm Road
content:
Meet at intersection of Cooneymus Road & Lewis Farm Road
(Transportation will be available for those preferring not to walk)
Join us for an autumnal walk to the beautiful Lewis Farm fields and meet the raptor-banding team from Biodiversity Research Institute. BRI has been banding falcons and other raptors on BI for over 10 years. With luck we’ll see a variety of raptors flying and hunting over the fields, and maybe even up close and personal.

Advance sign-up is encouraged but not required. Email: kim.gaffett@tnc.org.
address: Lewis Farm Rd & Cooneymus Rd New Shoreham Washington County

author: Austin Crawford
title: 25th Annual ChowdaFest at Block Island Maritime Institute
summary: How does 65° and sunny sound?  That's the weather forecast for BIMI's 25th Annual ChowdaFest on Sunday from 3:30 - 5:30PM!  So...dry out your rain-soaked clothes and bring your family and friends to BIMI to help choose Block Island's best chowda.  As usual, students from the Block Island School will help fill your cup with offerings from 12 of Block Island's great restaurants in a blind taste test to crown the winner. Buy tickets ahead of time right
content:
How does 65° and sunny sound?  That's the weather forecast for BIMI's 25th Annual ChowdaFest on Sunday from 3:30 - 5:30PM!  So...dry out your rain-soaked clothes and bring your family and friends to BIMI to help choose Block Island's best chowda.  As usual, students from the Block Island School will help fill your cup with offerings from 12 of Block Island's great restaurants in a blind taste test to crown the winner. Buy tickets ahead of time right
HERE!!  Tickets are $30 each and children under five are free.

 

Help support all the great things that happen at BIMI.  Seen you there!

author: Austin Crawford
title: ChowdaFest at Block Island Maritime Institute
summary: Kick off the summer with the 15th annual BIMI ChowdaFest!
content:
Kick off the summer with the 15th annual BIMI ChowdaFest!
Blind tasting of chowders from outstanding Block Island restaurants served by fantastic students from the Block Island School. Proceeds support BIMI’s Aquarium and Exploration Center. Tickets will go on sale online May 10th. $25 per person. 5 and under free.

author: Austin Crawford
title: ChowdaFest is back
summary: Finally! Save Sunday of Memorial Day weekend to help us find Block Island's favorite Chowda! 12 of Block Island's favorite restaurants will vie for the title and YOU can be part of it. Thanks to helpers from the Block Island School, you can taste and vote for one of the great Chowda entries.
content:
Finally! Save Sunday of Memorial Day weekend to help us find Block Island's favorite Chowda! 12 of Block Island's favorite restaurants will vie for the title and YOU can be part of it. Thanks to helpers from the Block Island School, you can taste and vote for one of the great Chowda entries.

Your ticket to ChowdaFest will help keep your entry to BIMI free. So go to


www.blockislandmaritime.org and buy your tickets today.

author: Austin Crawford
title: IRISH VOICES performed by Stephen Collins at Island Free Library
summary: The Friends of the Island Free Library are sponsoring IRISH VOICES performed by Stephen Collins on Saturday, September 27, 4:00 pm, at the Library. A great deal of Irish writing deals with the land, the past, the church, and the changing political landscape. Yeats, Joyce, Heaney, McCourt, and other prominent writers are represented in this dramatic offering.  Many of you may remember Stephen from his previous bravo performances: An Evening with Walt Whitman and Sailing Towards My Father which chronicled the life of Herman Melville.
content:
The Friends of the Island Free Library are sponsoring IRISH VOICES performed by Stephen Collins on Saturday, September 27, 4:00 pm, at the Library. A great deal of Irish writing deals with the land, the past, the church, and the changing political landscape. Yeats, Joyce, Heaney, McCourt, and other prominent writers are represented in this dramatic offering.  Many of you may remember Stephen from his previous bravo performances: An Evening with Walt Whitman and Sailing Towards My Father which chronicled the life of Herman Melville.

Refreshments will be served.

title: New Year's Eve Party at Yellow Kittens
summary: Bar opens at 4pm. Get ready for our New Year's Eve party! The Hennessy sisters will be playing live music from 7-9pm. Can't make it to midnight? Enjoy a champagne toast with us at 9pm. CAN make it to midnight? Dance the rest of the year away with DJ Hennessy and celebrate 2025 with an official midnight champagne toast! Proceeds from a $10 door cover will be donated to the Early Learning Center.

author: Austin Crawford
title: Theatrical Performance at Island Free Library
summary: Theatrical Performance on the Life of Herman Melville: On Saturday, October 19th, the Friends of the Library is sponsoring a theatrical performance, which is free and open to the public, entitled Sailing Towards My Father from 4-5pm at the Island Free Library. This one-man play written & directed by Carl A. Rossi and performed by Stephen Collins, chronicles Herman Melville’s life from youth to old age, concentrating on his evolution as a writer and his complex relations with God, his parents and siblings, his wife and children, and Nathanial Hawthorne. Please join us for this intense & insightful portrayal!!
content: Theatrical Performance on the Life of Herman Melville: On Saturday, October 19th, the Friends of the Library is sponsoring a theatrical performance, which is free and open to the public, entitled Sailing Towards My Father from 4-5pm at the Island Free Library. This one-man play written & directed by Carl A. Rossi and performed by Stephen Collins, chronicles Herman Melville’s life from youth to old age, concentrating on his evolution as a writer and his complex relations with God, his parents and siblings, his wife and children, and Nathanial Hawthorne. Please join us for this intense & insightful portrayal!!

author: Austin Crawford
title: Charcuterie Workshop at Spring Street Gallery
summary: We still have spots available for our Charcuterie Workshop Tomorrow!
content:
We still have spots available for our Charcuterie Workshop Tomorrow!

Join us for an evening of cheese! Learn how to make one of our delicious and beautiful charcuterie boards. 

It's $95 per person. Class includes all ingredients and tools to make a charcuterie board & a fun beverage!
 
The Class will run for about 1 hour and includes all the ingredients and materials to create your own board (to enjoy or take home with you!) The class will be outdoors. A rain date/refund will be issued if the class cannot take place on the scheduled date due to weather.  
 
Sign up at https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1k1m35le5cxQMCLdHJ1v6a1fXiWbydwiVklra3dnpDms/viewform?edit_requested=true

A bird walk for all skill levels. Bring binoculars and wear shoes that can get wet. Time changes weekly based on the tide.
address: Andy's Way New Shoreham Washington County

author: Austin Crawford
title: Magic Shows with Rob Martin
summary: Rob Martin is back this year with a whole new show! Rob Martin's Magic Show is now family friendly. 21+ can still bring your own wine. The show schedule and pricing have changed but it still has limited seating, so don't delay. Make sure you are signed up while you are here on vacation. You won't see this show anywhere else and it is the only magic show on Block Island!
content:
Rob Martin is back this year with a whole new show! Rob Martin's Magic Show is now family friendly. 21+ can still bring your own wine. The show schedule and pricing have changed but it still has limited seating, so don't delay. Make sure you are signed up while you are here on vacation. You won't see this show anywhere else and it is the only magic show on Block Island!

 

Excite your night, with Rob Martin's Magic Show, a visual and mental close-up magic show that gives you the rare opportunity to witness expert close-up magic. Join us, while we take a magical journey into the wild imagination of magician, Rob Martin. This isn’t your average kid’s magic show, but it is family friendly. To keep the show intimate and interactive, there will be no more than 25 guests per show. Please book online or call us to reserve your seat.

 

Rob Martin's Magic Show can be booked for private groups in house. Rob is also available for on location magic for events and parties. Please contact us via email or phone to inquire and check availability for private events.

 

Location: Block Island Ghost Tours on the second floor of the Odd Fellows Hall

Time: 8pm on Wednesdays, 6pm on Fridays, 4pm & 8pm on Saturdays

Length: 45 mins

Price: $40/person, $30 Children 12 & under

blockislandghosttours@gmail.com, 

401-477-2979

 

Click the link below for tickets.
